entries.reason: The host-neutral protocol is available, but no webpack lifecycle adapter is implemented.
The host-neutral protocol is available, but no Rspack lifecycle adapter is implemented.
No current component owns a chunk graph, so chunk-level host behavior must remain unavailable.
A module-level host cannot establish deterministic CSS order across chunks without an owned chunk graph.
Server rendering and federated module lifecycles need host-specific identity and invalidation contracts.
Module-level source maps are preserved, while chained maps across host transforms and chunks are not yet composed.
